summary: Completed ruthless QA execution for 15 critical UI flows on Visionary Suite. All 15 UI tests PASSED. Frontend is fully functional with proper navigation, authentication, dashboard, studio, battle pages, and responsive design.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before established (non-blocking, app still functional)

issues: Upsell modal 'You're on fire!' appears frequently - may interrupt user flow

UI-1.description: Landing page loads, CTA 'Create Your Story & Take #1 Spot' visible and clickable, navigates to /experience

UI-2.description: Login flow works - test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# redirects to /app dashboard

UI-3.description: Dashboard loads with LiveBattleHero showing 'The Crystal Maze' battle, stats (2.1K watching, 15 fighting, rank #6), video/poster, CTAs

UI-4.description: Dashboard 'Write Your Own Story' CTA navigates to /app/story-video-studio

UI-5.description: Studio page has title input, story textarea, style selector (6 styles), voice selector (5 voices) - all functional

UI-6.description: Studio guided start - vibe picker buttons visible (Bedtime Magic, Emotional, Twist, 1M Views), Random Idea button works

UI-7.description: Studio draft auto-save fires correctly (API call detected after typing)

UI-8.description: Admin login works - admin@creatorstudio.ai accesses /app/admin with Executive Dashboard

UI-9.description: Mobile responsiveness at 375px - no horizontal overflow, CTAs visible

UI-10.description: Protected route - unauthenticated access to /app redirects to /login

UI-11.description: Feed cards on dashboard - 232 story cards found, 4/5 have thumbnails, clickable

UI-12.description: Battle page loads at /app/story-battle/battle-demo-root - shows leaderboard, entries with pts

UI-13.description: Logout works - after logout, cannot access protected routes (redirects to /login)

UI-14.description: Post-gen loop CTAs - Enter Battle CTA visible, feature flag postGenerationLoop is ON

UI-15.description: Credits display shows '13 credits' for test user in user bar

critical_code_review_comments: CSP warning for Cloudflare beacon script - not blocking functionality but should be added to CSP if needed
WebSocket connection timing issue - closes before established but app handles gracefully
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 critical UI flows passed. Dashboard shows LiveBattleHero with 'The Crystal Maze' battle. Studio has 6 animation styles and 5 narrator voices. 232 story cards in feed with thumbnails. Admin panel shows Executive Dashboard with analytics. Feature flag postGenerationLoop is ON. WebSocket has timing issue but app handles gracefully.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues found. Minor WebSocket timing issue is non-blocking.
